## CommonsV2 Architecture Review — Kwame the Constructor

### Summary

The core architecture is sound in intent — WorldState as a central mutable singleton, pure renderer, tick-based loop. The execution has several structural breaks that will compound. Three of them are not "future problems." They are present bugs or will become bugs the moment someone touches adjacent code.
